title: John May
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|John}}
{{Image|person}}
'''John May''' was credited as a contributing editor for issues [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 2|2]] through [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 15|15]] of the ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly]]'' magazine, and as editor for issues [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 16|16]] through [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 18|18]]. He may have been a contributing editor for the [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 1|first issue]] as well.

He also wrote several articles for the magazine:

*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 2]]'': "[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] Lives"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 3]]'': "[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]—Rogue [[Spacer/Legends|Spacer]]!"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 4]]'': "[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]—From Youth to Man"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 5]]'': "[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]—[[Star Wars]]' Friendliest [[Alien/Legends|Alien]]"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 6]]'': "The Lowdown on [[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo]]"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 7]]'': "[[George Lucas]]—A Man and His Movies"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 8]]'': "The Special Effects Wizards"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 9]]'': "[[Ralph McQuarrie]]: Visualizer"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 10]]'': "The ''[[Star Wars]]'' Snowball"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 11]]'': "The Men Behind the Masks"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 12]]'': "The Soundmaster"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 13]]'': "The Model Squad"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 14]]'': "The Machines That Make Lines Move"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 15]]'': "'[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|Empire]]' Latest!"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 16]]'': "Fan Club Facts"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 17]]'': "Introducing the Intergalactic Inker...[[Russ Manning]]"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 18]]'': "The Empire Gets Closer"

{{Bio-stub}}
